prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on ethylene (C₂H₄, 6 atoms) performed with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (PySCF RKS, tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Single-point on the user-supplied geometry (not re-optimized at DFT). SCF converged in 6 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: trustworthy=true, all checks passed.

HOMO (index 7) = −7.6155818 eV
LUMO (index 8) = −0.17986527 eV
HOMO–LUMO gap (headline) = 7.4357165 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not a true excitation energy)
Total energy = −78.623486 Hartree (−2139.4541 eV)

Koopmans-derived: vertical IP = 7.6156 eV, vertical EA = 0.1799 eV, electronegativity = 3.8977 eV, chemical hardness = 3.7179 eV, electrophilicity = 2.0431 eV.

Density fitting (RI) was applied by default. The HOMO/LUMO energies are Kohn–Sham orbital energies; the gap is not a true optical gap. No experimental comparison was made.
